story-0019-001.summary: Replaced 5-step subagent prompt with /x-dev-lifecycle invocation. Added --reason flag for --skip-review.

story-0019-002.summary: Extended SubagentResult with reviewsExecuted, reviewScores, coverageLine, coverageBranch, tddCycles.

story-0019-003.summary: Added DoD enforcement gate to Phase 8 with mandatory/conditional/advisory classification.

story-0019-004.summary: Implemented rollback strategy, retry with error context (MAX_RETRIES=2), and block propagation.

story-0019-005.summary: Added Step 4.6 Conventional Commits validation to integrity gate.

story-0019-006.summary: Split Phase 3 into 3A (structural docs) and 3B (changelog after reviews).

story-0019-007.summary: Added Phase 8.5 PO Acceptance Gate with business value validation.

story-0019-008.summary: Added 4 new metrics sections to execution report template and updated report generation prompt.

story-0019-009.summary: Added Cross-Story Consistency Gate with 4 verification dimensions.

story-0019-010.summary: Added 4-point self-check validation to architecture plan.

story-0019-011.summary: Added INVEST validation quality gate to x-story-create.

story-0019-012.summary: Cleaned up all placeholders, implemented progress reporting and partial execution filter.

story-0019-013.summary: Reconciled stale status in epics 0015/0016/0018. Added status sync logging and verification.
